title: EVOKK Mixing Bowl Set 5 Stainless Steel Mixing Bowls (16,18, 20, 24, 26cm), Mirror Polished, Durable and Lightweight, Nesting Metal Mixing Bowls for Baking, Cooking & Food Prep, Dishwasher Safe
features: PERFECT FOR KITCHEN: The EVOKK mixing bowls are ideal for making cakes, bread dough, sauces, etc. good for a wide variety of uses in your kitchen.
EASY TO WASH: These high-quality bowls are washable and very easy to clean, its stainless steel won't stain or retain odours.
PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: These stainless steel mixing bowls are made of premium quality stainless steel that is durable and long lasting.
HIGH STANDARD BOWLS: These bowls have inside the mirror polishing technology, bright and clean bright beautiful, feel comfortable.
PACKAGE INCLUDES :These bowls comes with 4 pcs of bowl Approx size of the bowls is: 16CM, 20CM, 24CM & 26CM
description: Product Description Evokk Set of 4 mixing bowls comes with great finishing & clear look with four different sizes. These bowls comes with 4 pcs of bowl Approx size of the bowls is: >>16CM >>20CM >>24CM, >>26CM These bowls have inside the mirror polishing technology, bright and clean bright beautiful, feel comfortable. These stainless steel mixing bowls are made of premium quality stainless steel that is durable and long lasting. These high-quality bowls are washable and very easy to clean, its stainless steel won't stain or retain odors. The EVOKK mixing bowls are ideal for making cakes, bread dough, sauces, etc. good for a wide variety of uses in your kitchen. EVERYTHING YOU NEED FOR YOUR KITCHEN Constructed of top-grade mirror finished stainless steel for quality you can see and feel. The bowls resist dents, cracks, stains, and never absorbs odors. Mixing, beating, whipping, and tossing is easy and comfortable with the bowls’ wide flat rim that allows you to get the best grip possible and a drip-free pour. The bowls’ flat base ensures stability and flush placement on the kitchen counter for mess-free cooking and food preparation.
